requests.semantics: No exact Package release closure satisfies dependency, Package, Facet, host, and spec compatibility constraints.
tests: test/definition/resolver.test.ts#filters Package and Facet compatibility before deterministic selection

requests.semantics: A loaded module byte digest or inspected import closure differs from the immutable PackageCodeManifest.
tests: test/definition/loader.test.ts#preflights every exact module byte before invoking the evaluator
test/definition/loader.test.ts#rejects an inspected import outside the declared closure before evaluation

requests.semantics: An authoritative Blueprint-managed runtime record is missing, foreign, or differs from its active generation and automatic adoption is forbidden.
tests: test/definition/materializer.test.ts#rejects drift and rolls owner state back with journal state

requests.semantics: A reconciliation update or removal lacks complete current RunPins and Turn-placement release evidence; unknown, stale, partial, and referenced outcomes fail closed.
tests: test/definition/materializer.test.ts#fails closed on unknown RunPins evidence without advancing local state

requests.semantics: A deployment generation, outbox acknowledgement, predecessor pointer, or rollout completion loses its exact revision comparison.
tests: test/definition/rollout.test.ts#memory allocates generations with CAS and keeps acknowledgements idempotent
test/definition/rollout.test.ts#SQLite allocates generations with CAS and keeps acknowledgements idempotent
